title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge (v1 bin)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run `cargo clippy -p crossbridge --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic` and resolve every warning (currently 13). Top categories: unnecessary_wraps, single_match_else, similar_names, manual_let_else.

Acceptance criteria:
- `cargo clippy -p crossbridge --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings` exits 0.
- No blanket `#[allow(clippy::pedantic)]` or `#[allow(...)]` over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification comment when the pedantic suggestion is genuinely worse.
- All existing tests still pass (`cargo test -p crossbridge`).
- `cargo fmt --check` clean.
